text:
N Plus infinity Times Two revealed for Nintendo Switch 2

Metanet Software just revealed N Plus infinity Times Two, and it’s on the way to Nintendo Switch 2. A release is planned for 2027. N Plus infinity Times Two is a new take on the well-known platformer. According to Metanet, the team took the original experience “and remixed it from the ground up as the ultimate virtual couch party.” There’ll...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Final Fantasy 7 Revelation revealed for Nintendo Switch 2

Although everyone knew this would be coming at some point, Square Enix just revealed Final Fantasy 7 Revelation. The game is currently in development for Nintendo Switch 2. Square Enix is preparing launch for Spring 2027. Final Fantasy 7 Revelation will conclude the Final Fantasy 7 remake trilogy. Final Fantasy 7 Remake Intergrade landed on Nintendo Switch 2 earlier this...

The post Final Fantasy 7 Revelation revealed for Nintendo Switch 2 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Street Fighter 6 Year 4 DLC revealed, including Tifa from Final Fantasy 7

Capcom stopped by Summer Game Fest today to show off what’s coming to Street Fighter 6 Year 4, with the latest DLC announced – including Final Fantasy 7’s Tifa. Four new characters are slated for the game. Outside of Tifa, we’ll also be seeing Yasmine, Arjun, and Bosch. Here’s a trailer for the DLC, which was just shown off at...

The post Street Fighter 6 Year 4 DLC revealed, including Tifa from Final Fantasy 7 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Attack on Titan 3 announced for Nintendo Switch 2

During Summer Game Fest just a few moments ago, Koei Tecmo announced Attack on Titan 3 for Nintendo Switch 2. The last entry in the series made it to the original Nintendo Switch back in 2018. By the the third game arrives, it’ll be nearly a decade. Here’s the trailer that just debuted at Summer Game Fest: Announcement Trailer Lots...

text:
Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds announces Godzilla and Evangelion DLC

More DLC is on the way to Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds, with SEGA revealing new collaborations featuring Godzilla and Evangelion. Release timing will be given in the future. We also have an update on previously-announced DLC. Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles is coming in July, followed by Avatar Legends in October. Note that SEGA has even more DLC coming for Sonic Racing:...

text:
Hot Wheels: Infinite Rush leaks early for Nintendo Switch 2 [update: trailer, details]

Original: A brand new racer is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 with Hot Wheels: Infinite Rush, it’s been revealed. The game launches on September 24, 2026. This is the latest project from Milestone following two previously successful racing titles. The company was behind Hot Wheels Unleashed Hot Wheels Unleashed 2: Turbocharged. They launched in 2021 and 2023 respectively. As far...

text:
007 First Light announces new story mission with the return of Bawma

Bawma is returning in a new story mission for 007 First Light, IO Interactive has announced. Bawma, the largest black-market dealer in the Western Hemisphere, is one of the game’s main characters. Lenny Kravitz plays the role. Here’s what IO Interactive has said about the new mission thus far: “The King of Aleph needs MI6 and has personally requested Bond’s...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Alien Isolation 2 announced for Nintendo Switch 2

Today, Creative Assembly announced that Alien Isolation 2 is coming to Nintendo Switch 2. The title does not have a launch window currently. Alien Isolation originally released over a decade ago. A Nintendo Switch version hit the console at the end of 2019. Like the original, Alien Isolation 2 will offer a survival horror experience. Creative director Al Hope said...

The post Alien Isolation 2 announced for Nintendo Switch 2 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Mighty Cuphead Adventure announced, new Cuphead game on the way

At Summer Game Fest 2026 today, Studio MDHR revealed that it’s working on a brand new Cuphead game and Mighty Cuphead Adventure is set to be released. Mighty Cuphead Adventure is an 8-bit action platformer being made by a small team at Studio MDHR. The announcement notes that “this game goes beyond just taking inspiration from the classics of the...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Resident Evil Veronica announced for Nintendo Switch 2

Resident Evil Veronica is now in development for Nintendo Switch 2, Capcom just revealed. The game launches in 2027. Capcom has a habit of remaking Resident Evil titles and bringing out new entries. For this one, it’s the former. Resident Evil Veronica is being treated to a full-blown remake. Resident Evil – Code: Veronica makes its after the original launch...
